Left Behind (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $14,019,924Details
International Box Office $6,749,285
Worldwide Box Office $20,769,209
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,626,637
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $697,728
Total $5,324,365
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The most important event in the history of mankind is happening right now. In the blink of an eye, the biblical Rapture strikes the world. Millions of people disappear without a trace. All that remains are their clothes and belongings, and in an instant, terror and chaos spread around the world. The vanishings cause unmanned vehicles to crash and burn. Planes fall from the sky. Emergency forces everywhere are devastated. Gridlock, riots and looting overrun the cities. There is no one to help or provide answers. In a moment, the entire planet is plunged into darkness.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,300,146 (44.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.23 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:67.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$16,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,825 opening theaters/1,887 max. theaters, 2.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $20,523,659

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 3rd, 2014 (Wide) by Freestyle Releasing
International Releases: July 29th, 2015 (Wide) (Italy)
February 26th, 2016 (Wide) (China)
Video Release: January 6th, 2015 by Entertainment One
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some thematic elements, violence/peril and brief drug content.
(Rating bulletin 2341, 9/24/2014)
Running Time: 111 minutes
Franchise: Left Behind
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake
Plot point: Prophecy, Religious
Social setting: End of the World, Post Apocalypse, Rapture
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Target audience: Faith-Based Film
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Stoney Lake Entertainment, Entertainment One
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

The most important event in the history of mankind is happening right now. In the blink of an eye, the biblical Rapture strikes the world. Millions of people disappear without a trace. All that remains are their clothes and belongings, and in an instant, terror and chaos spread around the world. The vanishings cause unmanned vehicles to crash and burn. Planes fall from the sky. Emergency forces everywhere are devastated. Gridlock, riots and looting overrun the cities. There is no one to help or provide answers. In a moment, the entire planet is plunged into darkness.
